scripts.mobile:sync: bash scripts/mobile-build.sh && npx cap sync ios android
scripts.mobile:ios: bash scripts/mobile-build.sh && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: bash scripts/mobile-build.sh && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:clean: rm -rf out .next && bash scripts/mobile-build.sh && npx cap sync
